title: Replace CETA & HOPE logos with newly uploaded versions

requirements.summary: Replace all HOPE logo references with the new uploaded logo file (two cupped hands design with 'Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education' text)
acceptanceCriteria: The new HOPE logo (two hands / 'Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education') is displayed in the navbar, hero section, and footer.
No old HOPE logo image remains visible anywhere on the page.
Logo size and alignment are unchanged from Version 5.

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-1.png (circular design with two cupped hands and 'Helping Outstanding Pupils in Education' text) as a static asset at this exact path to replace the existing generated hope-logo file.

Update the HOPE logo image src attribute from the current path to reference '/assets/generated/hope-logo.png', preserving the existing className, alt text, width, height, and all other attributes to maintain the original size and position.

Update the HOPE logo image src attribute from the current path to reference '/assets/generated/hope-logo.png', preserving the existing className, alt text, dimensions, and all other styling to maintain the original size and position in the hero section.

Update the HOPE logo image src attribute from the current path to reference '/assets/generated/hope-logo.png', preserving the existing className, alt text, dimensions, and all other styling to maintain the original size and position in the footer.

requirements.summary: Replace all CETA logo references with the new uploaded logo file (globe and ribbon design with 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust' text)
acceptanceCriteria: The new CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust logo (globe/ribbon design) is displayed in the navbar, hero section, and footer.
No old CETA logo image remains visible anywhere on the page.
Logo size and alignment are unchanged from Version 5.

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded CETA Logo-Photoroom-1.png (circular design with globe, ribbon, and 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust' text) as a static asset at this exact path to replace the existing generated ceta-logo file.

Update the CETA logo image src attribute from the current path to reference '/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png', preserving the existing className, alt text, width, height, and all other attributes to maintain the original size and position.

Update the CETA logo image src attribute from the current path to reference '/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png', preserving the existing className, alt text, dimensions, and all other styling to maintain the original size and position in the hero section.

Update the CETA logo image src attribute from the current path to reference '/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png', preserving the existing className, alt text, dimensions, and all other styling to maintain the original size and position in the footer.
